calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Continued To Dec-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Thomas Ferry, in person, specially appearing for Peter Bresler.

The court notes that there are no objections to this petition and discusses the bond issue with counsel.

After discussion, the matter is continued to Dec-15-2025 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Robles. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Continued To Oct-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared via zoom for Johnson Truong (petitioner).

Order to Appear is ordered off calendar. Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to October 27, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will review the supplement and notify parties if the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2025 Continued To May-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court noted that it recently received an update that attorney Peter Bresler had recently suffered from health problems. Therefore, the court opted not to issue an Order to Show Cause regarding sanctions for failure to appear. The court continued the matter to May 5, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and will issue an Order to Appear for an attorney from the firm to appear at the next hearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
